01 — About

Who I am

I'm a Data Analyst based in Bengaluru, with experience transforming complex datasets into actionable business insights using SQL, Power BI, Python and Excel.

My work focuses on data analysis, dashboard development, anomaly detection, and performance reporting. I enjoy uncovering patterns hidden within large datasets and translating them into clear, decision-ready insights that help organizations improve efficiency and make informed business decisions.

I have built analytical solutions across banking, business performance, and telecom domains, working with datasets ranging from operational transactions to enterprise-level KPI reporting. My projects combine data modeling, statistical analysis, and interactive visualization to solve real-world business problems.

Outside of analytics, I'm continuously expanding my skills in data storytelling, business intelligence, and advanced analytical techniques to deliver greater value through data-driven decision making.

02 — Experience

Work History

Jan 2024 — Jan 2025
Data Analyst — Transaction Analytics
HectaData Pvt Ltd · Client: FSS / Canara Bank · Bangalore
  • Analyzed high-volume ATM, POS, and digital payment transaction data using SQL and Excel to uncover decline patterns, monitor channel success rates, and surface day-over-day anomalies.
  • Segmented transaction failure data by error codes and issuer/acquirer channels to identify recurring patterns and contributing factors behind declines.
  • Built interactive Power BI dashboards tracking channel-wise performance trends, enabling faster identification of high-failure-rate segments across the network.
  • Conducted historical trend analysis using Excel (Power Query, Pivot Tables) to benchmark current decline volumes and highlight statistically significant outliers.
  • Applied time-series analysis using SQL window functions (LAG/LEAD) to identify lag-effect correlations between peak-hour traffic surges and timeout failure spikes.
